query: select 1 * ( strftime('%j',current_time) - strftime('%j',treatment.treatmenttime) ) from treatment where treatment.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '027-178044' and patient.hospitaldischargetime is null ) ) order by treatment.treatmenttime desc limit 1
q_tag: how many [unit_count] have passed since the [time_filter_exact1] time patient {patient_id} received a procedure on the current hospital visit?
tag: how many [unit_count:days] have passed since the [time_filter_exact1:exact-last] time patient {patient_id} received a procedure on the current hospital visit?

query: select treatment.treatmentname from treatment where treatment.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '022-6959' ) ) and datetime(treatment.treatmenttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-5 year') order by treatment.treatmenttime asc limit 1

question: What medication was prescribed for patient 022-44805 during the same hospital visit after being diagnosed with acute renal failure - due to hypovolemia/decreased circulating volume within the past 53 months?
template: what was the name of the drug that patient 022-44805 was prescribed within the same hospital visit after having been diagnosed with acute renal failure - due to hypovolemia/decreased circulating volume since 53 month ago?
query: select t2.drugname from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '022-44805' ) and diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'acute renal failure - due to hypovolemia/decreased circulating volume' and datetime(diagnosis.diagnosistime) >= datetime(current_time,'-53 month') ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugname, medication.drugstarttime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '022-44805' ) and datetime(medication.drugstarttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-53 month') ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where t1.diagnosistime < t2.drugstarttime and t1.patienthealthsystemstayid = t2.patienthealthsystemstayid

question: What is the name of the drug prescribed to patient 033-10145 during the same hospital visit after being diagnosed with drug withdrawal syndrome on or before 02/2105?

query: select t2.drugname from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '033-10145' ) and diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'drug withdrawal syndrome' and strftime('%y-%m',diagnosis.diagnosistime) <= '2105-02' ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugname, medication.drugstarttime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '033-10145' ) and strftime('%y-%m',medication.drugstarttime) <= '2105-02' ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where t1.diagnosistime < t2.drugstarttime and t1.patienthealthsystemstayid = t2.patienthealthsystemstayid
q_tag: what was the name of the drug that patient {patient_id} was prescribed [time_filter_within] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what was the name of the drug that patient {patient_id} was prescribed [time_filter_within:within-hosp] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1:abs-month-until]?

query: select lab.labresult from lab where lab.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '011-57670' and patient.hospitaldischargetime is not null order by patient.hospitaladmittime desc limit 1 ) ) and lab.labname = 'bedside glucose' and lab.labresulttime = ( select distinct lab.labresulttime from lab where lab.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '011-57670' and patient.hospitaldischargetime is not null order by patient.hospitaladmittime desc limit 1 ) ) and lab.labname = 'bedside glucose' order by lab.labresulttime desc limit 1 )
q_tag: what was the [time_filter_exact1] measured value of a {lab_name} lab test of patient {patient_id} [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what was the [time_filter_exact1:exact-last] measured value of a {lab_name} lab test of patient {patient_id} [time_filter_global1:rel-hosp-last]?

query: select allergy.drugname from allergy where allergy.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '006-86236' ) ) and strftime('%y-%m',allergy.allergytime) <= '2105-09'
q_tag: what was the name of the substance that patient {patient_id} was allergic to [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what was the name of the substance that patient {patient_id} was allergic to [time_filter_global1:abs-month-until]?

template: what was the organism name found in the first urine, voided specimen microbiology test of patient 031-24513 until 11 month ago?
query: select microlab.organism from microlab where microlab.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '031-24513' ) ) and microlab.culturesite = 'urine, voided specimen' and datetime(microlab.culturetakentime) <= datetime(current_time,'-11 month') order by microlab.culturetakentime asc limit 1

query: select sum(intakeoutput.cellvaluenumeric) from intakeoutput where intakeoutput.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '007-15837' ) ) and intakeoutput.celllabel = 'volume (ml) norepinephrine' and intakeoutput.cellpath like '%intake%' and datetime(intakeoutput.intakeoutputtime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') and strftime('%m-%d',intakeoutput.intakeoutputtime) = '12-31'
q_tag: what was the total volume of {intake_name} intake that patient {patient_id} received [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what was the total volume of {intake_name} intake that patient {patient_id} received [time_filter_global1:mix-day-this_year]?

query: select diagnosis.diagnosistime from diagnosis where diagnosis.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '030-6441' ) ) and diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'pancytopenia' and datetime(diagnosis.diagnosistime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') order by diagnosis.diagnosistime asc limit 1

query: select medication.drugstarttime from medication where medication.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '021-35005' and patient.hospitaldischargetime is not null order by patient.hospitaladmittime asc limit 1 ) ) and medication.drugname = 'ketorolac tromethamine' order by medication.drugstarttime asc limit 1
q_tag: when was the [time_filter_exact1] time that patient {patient_id} was prescribed {drug_name} [time_filter_global1]?

question: When were ns 1,000 ml and fentanyl inj 25 mcg prescribed to patient 007-3099 for the last time prior to July 2105 at the same time?
template: when was the last time that patient 007-3099 was prescribed ns 1,000 ml and fentanyl inj 25 mcg at the same time until 07/2105?
query: select t1.drugstarttime from ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'ns 1,000 ml' and patient.uniquepid = '007-3099' and strftime('%y-%m',medication.drugstarttime) <= '2105-07' ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'fentanyl inj 25 mcg' and patient.uniquepid = '007-3099' and strftime('%y-%m',medication.drugstarttime) <= '2105-07' ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where datetime(t1.drugstarttime) = datetime(t2.drugstarttime) order by t1.drugstarttime desc limit 1

query: select lab.labresulttime from lab where lab.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '027-194474' ) ) and lab.labname = 'mcv' and datetime(lab.labresulttime) <= datetime(current_time,'-8 month') and lab.labresulttime = ( select distinct lab.labresulttime from lab where lab.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '027-194474' ) ) and lab.labname = 'mcv' and datetime(lab.labresulttime) <= datetime(current_time,'-8 month') order by lab.labresulttime desc limit 1 )
q_tag: when was the [time_filter_exact1] time that patient {patient_id} received a {lab_name} lab test [time_filter_global1]?
tag: when was the [time_filter_exact1:exact-last] time that patient {patient_id} received a {lab_name} lab test [time_filter_global1:rel-month-until]?

query: select intakeoutput.intakeoutputtime from intakeoutput where intakeoutput.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '015-72608' ) ) and intakeoutput.cellpath like '%intake%' and intakeoutput.celllabel = 'per iv flush: antecubital r 18 gauge' and strftime('%y-%m-%d',intakeoutput.intakeoutputtime) <= '2105-12-00' order by intakeoutput.intakeoutputtime desc limit 1

query: select avg(lab.labresult) from lab where lab.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '012-58944' ) ) and lab.labname = 'fio2' and strftime('%y-%m',lab.labresulttime) >= '2103-03' group by strftime('%y-%m',lab.labresulttime)
q_tag: list the [unit_average] [agg_function] {lab_name} lab value of patient {patient_id} [time_filter_global1].
tag: list the [unit_average:monthly] [agg_function:average] {lab_name} lab value of patient {patient_id} [time_filter_global1:abs-month-since].

question: What is the monthly maximum bedside glucose of patient 017-49375 during this year?
template: list the monthly maximum bedside glucose lab value of patient 017-49375 this year.
query: select max(lab.labresult) from lab where lab.patientunitstayid in ( select patient.patientunitstayid from patient where patient.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.uniquepid = '017-49375' ) ) and lab.labname = 'bedside glucose' and datetime(lab.labresulttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') group by strftime('%y-%m',lab.labresulttime)
q_tag: list the [unit_average] [agg_function] {lab_name} lab value of patient {patient_id} [time_filter_global1].
tag: list the [unit_average:monthly] [agg_function:maximum] {lab_name} lab value of patient {patient_id} [time_filter_global1:rel-year-this].

question: What is the monthly maximum respiration rate for patient 017-61209 in the first hospital encounter?

question: What was the survival rate of patients diagnosed with hepatic dysfunction - liver transplant over the past year?
template: what is the one year survival rate of patients diagnosed with hepatic dysfunction - liver transplant?
query: select sum( case when patient.hospitaldischargestatus = 'alive' then 1 when strftime('%j',patient.hospitaldischargetime) - strftime('%j',t2.diagnosistime) > 1 * 365 then 1 else 0 end ) * 100 / count(*) from ( select t1.uniquepid, t1.diagnosistime from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'hepatic dysfunction - liver transplant' group by patient.uniquepid having min(diagnosis.diagnosistime) = diagnosis.diagnosistime ) as t1 where strftime('%j',current_time) - strftime('%j',t1.diagnosistime) > 1 * 365 ) as t2 join patient on t2.uniquepid = patient.uniquepid
q_tag: what is the [n_survival_period] survival rate of patients diagnosed with {diagnosis_name}?
tag: what is the [n_survival_period:one year] survival rate of patients diagnosed with {diagnosis_name}?

question: What is the five-year survival rate for patients who were prescribed Protonix after being diagnosed with hypokalemia - severe ( < 2.8 meq/dl)?
template: what is the five year survival rate of patients who were prescribed protonix after having been diagnosed with hypokalemia - severe ( < 2.8 meq/dl)?
query: select sum( case when patient.hospitaldischargestatus = 'alive' then 1 when strftime('%j',patient.hospitaldischargetime) - strftime('%j',t4.diagnosistime) > 5 * 365 then 1 else 0 end ) * 100 / count(*) from ( select t2.uniquepid, t2.diagnosistime from ( select t1.uniquepid, t1.diagnosistime from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'hypokalemia - severe ( < 2.8 meq/dl)' group by patient.uniquepid having min(diagnosis.diagnosistime) = diagnosis.diagnosistime ) as t1 ) as t2 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'protonix' ) as t3 on t2.uniquepid = t3.uniquepid where t2.diagnosistime < t3.drugstarttime ) as t4 join patient on t4.uniquepid = patient.uniquepid
q_tag: what is the [n_survival_period] survival rate of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name}?
tag: what is the [n_survival_period:five year] survival rate of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name}?

question: What is the two-year survival probability for patients who had been prescribed NaCl 0.9% MBP after being diagnosed with abdominal compartment syndrome?
template: what is the two year survival rate of patients who were prescribed nacl 0.9% mbp after having been diagnosed with abdominal compartment syndrome?
query: select sum( case when patient.hospitaldischargestatus = 'alive' then 1 when strftime('%j',patient.hospitaldischargetime) - strftime('%j',t4.diagnosistime) > 2 * 365 then 1 else 0 end ) * 100 / count(*) from ( select t2.uniquepid, t2.diagnosistime from ( select t1.uniquepid, t1.diagnosistime from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'abdominal compartment syndrome' group by patient.uniquepid having min(diagnosis.diagnosistime) = diagnosis.diagnosistime ) as t1 ) as t2 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'nacl 0.9% mbp' ) as t3 on t2.uniquepid = t3.uniquepid where t2.diagnosistime < t3.drugstarttime ) as t4 join patient on t4.uniquepid = patient.uniquepid
q_tag: what is the [n_survival_period] survival rate of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name}?
tag: what is the [n_survival_period:two year] survival rate of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name}?

question: What were the three diagnoses that had the highest three-year mortality rate?
template: what are the top three diagnoses that have the highest three year mortality rate?
query: select t4.diagnosisname from ( select t3.diagnosisname, dense_rank() over ( order by t3.c1 desc ) as c2 from ( select t2.diagnosisname, 100 - sum( case when patient.hospitaldischargestatus = 'alive' then 1 when strftime('%j',patient.hospitaldischargetime) - strftime('%j',t2.diagnosistime) > 3 * 365 then 1 else 0 end ) * 100 / count(*) as c1 from ( select t1.uniquepid, t1.diagnosisname, t1.diagnosistime from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosisname, diagnosis.diagnosistime from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid group by patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosisname having min(diagnosis.diagnosistime) = diagnosis.diagnosistime ) as t1 where strftime('%j',current_time) - strftime('%j',t1.diagnosistime) > 3 * 365 ) as t2 join patient on t2.uniquepid = patient.uniquepid group by t2.diagnosisname ) as t3 ) as t4 where t4.c2 <= 3
q_tag: what are the top [n_rank] diagnoses that have the highest [n_survival_period] mortality rate?
tag: what are the top [n_rank:three] diagnoses that have the highest [n_survival_period:three year] mortality rate?

question: What is the minimum total cost of a hospital stay that includes a procedure called bronchodilator - leukotriene receptor antagonists?
template: what is the minimum total hospital cost that involves a procedure named bronchodilator - leukotriene receptor antagonists?
query: select min(t1.c1) from ( select sum(cost.cost) as c1 from cost where cost.patienthealthsystemstayid in ( select patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from patient where patient.patientunitstayid in ( select treatment.patientunitstayid from treatment where treatment.treatmentname = 'bronchodilator - leukotriene receptor antagonists' ) ) group by cost.patienthealthsystemstayid ) as t1
q_tag: what is_verb the [agg_function] total hospital cost that involves a procedure named {procedure_name} [time_filter_global1]?

question: How many patients passed away in the same hospital visit after being diagnosed with hypertension - hypertensive emergency/urgency in 2104?
template: count the number of patients who were dead after having been diagnosed with hypertension - hypertensive emergency/urgency within the same hospital visit in 2104.
query: select count( distinct t2.uniquepid ) from ( select t1.uniquepid, t1.diagnosistime, t1.patienthealthsystemstayid from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'hypertension - hypertensive emergency/urgency' ) as t1 group by t1.uniquepid having min(t1.diagnosistime) = t1.diagnosistime and strftime('%y',t1.diagnosistime) = '2104' ) as t2 join ( select patient.uniquepid, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid, patient.hospitaldischargetime from patient where patient.hospitaldischargestatus = 'expired' ) as t3 on t2.uniquepid = t3.uniquepid where t2.patienthealthsystemstayid = t3.patienthealthsystemstayid

query: select count( distinct t1.uniquepid ) from ( select patient.uniquepid, count(*) as c1 from patient where patient.patientunitstayid = ( select treatment.patientunitstayid from treatment where treatment.treatmentname = 'vte prophylaxis - factor xa inhibitor' and strftime('%y',treatment.treatmenttime) <= '2104' ) group by patient.uniquepid ) as t1 where t1.c1 = 2
q_tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name} procedure [n_times] [time_filter_global1].
tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name} procedure [n_times:two times] [time_filter_global1:abs-year-until].

question: How many patients were given neurosurgery - ventricular shunt procedure two or more times since in the last 6 years?
template: count the number of patients who received a neurosurgery - ventricular shunt proceduretwo or more times since 6 year ago.
query: select count( distinct t1.uniquepid ) from ( select patient.uniquepid, count(*) as c1 from patient where patient.patientunitstayid = ( select treatment.patientunitstayid from treatment where treatment.treatmentname = 'neurosurgery - ventricular shunt procedure' and datetime(treatment.treatmenttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-6 year') ) group by patient.uniquepid ) as t1 where t1.c1 >= 2
q_tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name} procedure [n_times] [time_filter_global1].
tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name} procedure [n_times:two or more times] [time_filter_global1:rel-year-since].

question: How many patients received mechanical ventilation within the past 2 months after previously being treated with antiarrhythmics - class iii antiarrhythmic since in the last 5 years?
template: count the number of patients who received a mechanical ventilation procedure within 2 month after having received a antiarrhythmics - class iii antiarrhythmic procedure since 5 year ago.
query: select count( distinct t1.uniquepid ) from ( select patient.uniquepid, treatment.treatmenttime from treatment join patient on treatment.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where treatment.treatmentname = 'antiarrhythmics - class iii antiarrhythmic' and datetime(treatment.treatmenttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-5 year') ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, treatment.treatmenttime from treatment join patient on treatment.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where treatment.treatmentname = 'mechanical ventilation' and datetime(treatment.treatmenttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-5 year') ) as t2 where t1.treatmenttime < t2.treatmenttime and datetime(t2.treatmenttime) between datetime(t1.treatmenttime) and datetime(t1.treatmenttime,'+2 month')
q_tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name2} procedure [time_filter_within] after having received a {procedure_name1} procedure [time_filter_global1].
tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name2} procedure [time_filter_within:within-n_month] after having received a {procedure_name1} procedure [time_filter_global1:rel-year-since].

q_tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name2} procedure [time_filter_within] after having received a {procedure_name1} procedure [time_filter_global1].
tag: count the number of patients who received a {procedure_name2} procedure [time_filter_within:within-month] after having received a {procedure_name1} procedure [time_filter_global1:rel-year-this].

query: select count( distinct t1.uniquepid ) from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'pain' and datetime(diagnosis.diagnosistime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'losartan potassium 50 mg po tabs' and datetime(medication.drugstarttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') ) as t2 where t1.diagnosistime < t2.drugstarttime and t1.patienthealthsystemstayid = t2.patienthealthsystemstayid
q_tag: count the number of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} [time_filter_within] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1].
tag: count the number of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} [time_filter_within:within-hosp] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1:rel-year-last].

question: Since 4 years ago, how many patients were prescribed potassium chloride in NaCl 40 mEq in 250 ml (premix) within 2 months after the diagnosis of hyperosmolar nonketotic coma?
template: count the number of patients who were prescribed potassium chloride in nacl 40 meq in 250 ml (premix) within 2 month after having been diagnosed with hyperosmolar nonketotic coma since 4 year ago.
query: select count( distinct t1.uniquepid ) from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'hyperosmolar nonketotic coma' and datetime(diagnosis.diagnosistime) >= datetime(current_time,'-4 year') ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'potassium chloride in nacl 40 meq in 250 ml (premix)' and datetime(medication.drugstarttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-4 year') ) as t2 where t1.diagnosistime < t2.drugstarttime and datetime(t2.drugstarttime) between datetime(t1.diagnosistime) and datetime(t1.diagnosistime,'+2 month')

value.drug_name: potassium chloride in nacl 40 meq in 250 ml (premix)

q_tag: count the number of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} [time_filter_within] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1].
tag: count the number of patients who were prescribed {drug_name} [time_filter_within:within-n_month] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1:rel-year-since].

question: What are the top four most frequent diagnoses up to 2104?
template: what were the top four frequent diagnoses until 2104?
query: select t1.diagnosisname from ( select diagnosis.diagnosisname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from diagnosis where strftime('%y',diagnosis.diagnosistime) <= '2104' group by diagnosis.diagnosisname ) as t1 where t1.c1 <= 4
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequent diagnoses [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:four] frequent diagnoses [time_filter_global1:abs-year-until]?

question: Since 2102, what are the top four most frequent diagnoses given to patients during the same hospital visit after receiving wound care?
template: what are the top four frequent diagnoses that patients were diagnosed within the same hospital visit after having received a wound care procedure since 2102?
query: select t3.diagnosisname from ( select t2.diagnosisname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from ( select patient.uniquepid, treatment.treatmenttime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from treatment join patient on treatment.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where treatment.treatmentname = 'wound care' and strftime('%y',treatment.treatmenttime) >= '2102' ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosisname, diagnosis.diagnosistime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where strftime('%y',diagnosis.diagnosistime) >= '2102' ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where t1.treatmenttime < t2.diagnosistime and t1.patienthealthsystemstayid = t2.patienthealthsystemstayid group by t2.diagnosisname ) as t3 where t3.c1 <= 4
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequent diagnoses that patients were diagnosed [time_filter_within] after having received a {procedure_name} procedure [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:four] frequent diagnoses that patients were diagnosed [time_filter_within:within-hosp] after having received a {procedure_name} procedure [time_filter_global1:abs-year-since]?

template: what are the top three frequent procedures that patients received within the same month after having received a urine alkalinization - sodium bicarbonate procedure since 2104?
query: select t3.treatmentname from ( select t2.treatmentname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from ( select patient.uniquepid, treatment.treatmenttime from treatment join patient on treatment.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where treatment.treatmentname = 'urine alkalinization - sodium bicarbonate' and strftime('%y',treatment.treatmenttime) >= '2104' ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, treatment.treatmentname, treatment.treatmenttime from treatment join patient on treatment.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where strftime('%y',treatment.treatmenttime) >= '2104' ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where t1.treatmenttime < t2.treatmenttime and datetime(t1.treatmenttime,'start of month') = datetime(t2.treatmenttime,'start of month') group by t2.treatmentname ) as t3 where t3.c1 <= 3

query: select t1.drugname from ( select medication.drugname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from medication where strftime('%y',medication.drugstarttime) = '2105' group by medication.drugname ) as t1 where t1.c1 <= 4
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequently prescribed drugs [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:four] frequently prescribed drugs [time_filter_global1:abs-year-in]?

question: Can you tell me the top five most commonly prescribed drugs this year?
template: what are the top five frequently prescribed drugs this year?
query: select t1.drugname from ( select medication.drugname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from medication where datetime(medication.drugstarttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') group by medication.drugname ) as t1 where t1.c1 <= 5
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequently prescribed drugs [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:five] frequently prescribed drugs [time_filter_global1:rel-year-this]?

question: What were the four most frequently prescribed drugs for patients aged 60 or above since 2101?

question: Among patients who were prescribed clonazepam 0.5 mg po tabs, what were the five most frequently ordered drugs at the same time in 2102?
template: what were the top five frequent prescribed drugs for patients who were also prescribed clonazepam 0.5 mg po tabs at the same time in 2102?
query: select t3.drugname from ( select t2.drugname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'clonazepam 0.5 mg po tabs' and strftime('%y',medication.drugstarttime) = '2102' ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugname, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where strftime('%y',medication.drugstarttime) = '2102' ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where datetime(t1.drugstarttime) = datetime(t2.drugstarttime) group by t2.drugname ) as t3 where t3.c1 <= 5
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequent prescribed drugs for patients who were also prescribed {drug_name} [time_filter_within] [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:five] frequent prescribed drugs for patients who were also prescribed {drug_name} [time_filter_within:within-same] [time_filter_global1:abs-year-in]?

template: what are the top four frequent drugs that patients were prescribed within the same month after having been prescribed with 50 ml syringe: dextrose 50 % iv soln since 6 year ago?
query: select t3.drugname from ( select t2.drugname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = '50 ml syringe: dextrose 50 % iv soln' and datetime(medication.drugstarttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-6 year') ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugname, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where datetime(medication.drugstarttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-6 year') ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where t1.drugstarttime < t2.drugstarttime and datetime(t1.drugstarttime,'start of month') = datetime(t2.drugstarttime,'start of month') group by t2.drugname ) as t3 where t3.c1 <= 4
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequent drugs that patients were prescribed [time_filter_within] after having been prescribed with {drug_name} [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:four] frequent drugs that patients were prescribed [time_filter_within:within-month] after having been prescribed with {drug_name} [time_filter_global1:rel-year-since]?

question: What were the five most frequently prescribed drugs for patients who were previously prescribed with folic acid 1 mg tab within 2 months until 2104?
template: what were the top five frequent drugs that patients were prescribed within 2 month after having been prescribed with folic acid 1 mg tab until 2104?
query: select t3.drugname from ( select t2.drugname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where medication.drugname = 'folic acid 1 mg tab' and strftime('%y',medication.drugstarttime) <= '2104' ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugname, medication.drugstarttime from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where strftime('%y',medication.drugstarttime) <= '2104' ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where t1.drugstarttime < t2.drugstarttime and datetime(t2.drugstarttime) between datetime(t1.drugstarttime) and datetime(t1.drugstarttime,'+2 month') group by t2.drugname ) as t3 where t3.c1 <= 5
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequent drugs that patients were prescribed [time_filter_within] after having been prescribed with {drug_name} [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:five] frequent drugs that patients were prescribed [time_filter_within:within-n_month] after having been prescribed with {drug_name} [time_filter_global1:abs-year-until]?

question: What are the three most commonly prescribed drugs during the same hospital visit for patients in their 40s after they have been diagnosed with dementia within the past year?
template: what were the top three frequently prescribed drugs that patients aged 40s were prescribed within the same hospital visit after having been diagnosed with dementia last year?
query: select t3.drugname from ( select t2.drugname, dense_rank() over ( order by count(*) desc ) as c1 from ( select patient.uniquepid, diagnosis.diagnosistime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from diagnosis join patient on diagnosis.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where diagnosis.diagnosisname = 'dementia' and datetime(diagnosis.diagnosistime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') ) as t1 join ( select patient.uniquepid, medication.drugname, medication.drugstarttime, patient.patienthealthsystemstayid from medication join patient on medication.patientunitstayid = patient.patientunitstayid where patient.age between 40 and 49 and datetime(medication.drugstarttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') ) as t2 on t1.uniquepid = t2.uniquepid where t1.diagnosistime < t2.drugstarttime and t1.patienthealthsystemstayid = t2.patienthealthsystemstayid group by t2.drugname ) as t3 where t3.c1 <= 3
q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequently prescribed drugs that patients aged [age_group] were prescribed [time_filter_within] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:three] frequently prescribed drugs that patients aged [age_group:40s] were prescribed [time_filter_within:within-hosp] after having been diagnosed with {diagnosis_name} [time_filter_global1:rel-year-last]?

question: Since 2105, what are the five most frequently prescribed medications during the same month to female patients in their 30s after being diagnosed with sepsis - severe?

q_tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank] frequent specimens that patients were tested [time_filter_within] after having received a {procedure_name} procedure [time_filter_global1]?
tag: what are_verb the top [n_rank:three] frequent specimens that patients were tested [time_filter_within:within-month] after having received a {procedure_name} procedure [time_filter_global1:abs-year-in]?
